desc: Runs the Error Manager rule engine for the active document and exports QA XML compatible with the clash navigator.
summary: Runs the Error Manager rule engine for the active document and exports QA XML compatible with the clash navigator.
usecase: User or AI triggers a full QA sweep before coordination review.
notfor: Editing rule JSON (use dedicated authoring flows) or manipulating individual clash rows in the navigator.
precondition: Active document should be saved so .mepbridge/qa/results.xml can be written beside the RVT. Shared parameter file must be writable when first binding Error / Error Type.
postcondition: results.xml is refreshed (or an error JSON is stored in LastQueryResult).

config_inputs.name: ruleSetName
config_inputs.description: Optional rule set name (without .json) from project or user RuleSets folder

preprompts: Starting QA rule sweep for this model…
thinkingsteps: Ensuring Error / Error Type shared parameters are bound…
Loading the requested rule set (or all discoverable rules)…
successprompts: Error check finished — {count} findings written to QA XML.
QA sweep complete with summary: total {total}, active {active}, new {newCount}, resolved {resolved}.
